subject: A humanoid figure with an exposed, open skull revealing a brain, surrounded by metal spikes, with glowing red eyes and a wide grin, depicted in extreme close-up
description: An extreme close-up portrait of a figure's face. The top of the skull is cut open and folded back, exposing a visible brain. The head is ringed by long metal spikes radiating outward like a crown or collar. The face has an unnervingly wide, tooth-baring grin and two glowing red eyes. The skin is smooth and pale grey. The background is a burning red-orange haze with structural debris. The overall effect is a grotesque clown or demon aesthetic combined with body horror. The figure appears completely at ease with — even pleased by — the exposure of its own anatomy.
foreground: Grey-skinned grinning figure with exposed brain, red eyes, radiating metal spikes
emotion: maniacal delight — the grin is wide and unnerving, suggesting pleasure in its own grotesqueness
